formulas.latex: \begin{matrix}E_{k i} = \sum_{t = \left(\hat{d}\right)_{k , i}}^{t_{k , i}^{a c c}} E_{k i t}^{a} + \sum_{t = t_{k , i}^{a c c}}^{t_{k , i}^{c o a}} E_{k i t}^{c} = \sum_{t = \left(\hat{d}\right)_{k , i}}^{\left(\hat{a}\right)_{k , i + 1}} \varepsilon \left(u_{k i} \left(t\right)\right) M_{k i} u_{k i} \left(t\right) v_{k i} \left(t\right) ,\end{matrix}

formulas.latex: \begin{matrix}\begin{matrix}\underset{\mathbf{a} , \mathbf{d}}{min} & z = \mathbb{E} \left[\sum_{k = 1}^{K} \sum_{i = 1}^{2 I} \left(w_{d} T_{k , i}^{d e l a y} + w_{t} T_{k , i}^{t r a v e l}\right) + w_{e} E_{t o t a l}\right] \\ s . t . & 0 \leq d_{k , i} - \left(\bar{d}\right)_{k , i} < \alpha_{d , k} , \forall 1 \leq i \leq 2 I , k \in \mathcal{K} \\ & 0 \leq a_{k , i} - \left(\bar{a}\right)_{k , i} < \alpha_{d , k} , \forall 1 \leq i \leq 2 I , k \in \mathcal{K} \\ & a_{k , i + 1} - d_{k , i} \geq t_{r , i}^{m i n} , \forall \left(1 \leq i < I\right) \cup \left(I < i < 2 I\right) , k \in \mathcal{K} \\ & d_{k , i} - a_{k , i} \geq t_{d , i}^{m i n} , \forall 1 \leq i \leq 2 I , k \in \mathcal{K} \\ & d_{k , I} + t_{t u r n} = a_{k , I + 1} , \forall k \in \mathcal{K} \\ & N_{k}^{v} \left(t\right) \leq C_{k} , \forall k \in \mathcal{K} , t \in \left[t_{0} , t_{e n d}\right] \\ & a_{k , i} + h_{m i n} \leq a_{k + 1 , i} , \forall 1 \leq i \leq 2 I , 1 \leq k < K \\ & d_{k , i} + h_{m i n} \leq d_{k + 1 , i} , \forall 1 \leq i \leq 2 I , 1 \leq k < K \\ & a_{k , i} \in \mathbb{N}^{+} , \forall 1 \leq i \leq 2 I , k \in \mathcal{K} \\ & d_{k , i} \in \mathbb{N}^{+} , \forall 1 \leq i \leq 2 I , k \in \mathcal{K}\end{matrix}\end{matrix}

formulas.latex: \begin{matrix}N_{i + 1}^{w} \left(T_{a , k , i + 1}\right) = \begin{cases} N_{i + 1}^{w} \left(t_{0}\right) + N_{t_{0} , T_{a , k , i + 1} , \xi}^{i + 1} & \text{if} k = 1 , \\ N_{i + 1}^{w} \left(T_{a , k - 1 , i + 1} + t_{k - 1 , i + 1}^{d}\right) + N_{T_{a , k - 1 , i + 1} , T_{a , k , i + 1} , \xi}^{i + 1} & \text{otherwise}, \end{cases}\end{matrix}

formulas.latex: \begin{matrix}0 \leq \sum_{i^{'} = 1}^{i} t_{k , i^{'}}^{d} + \sum_{i^{'} = 1}^{i} t_{k , i^{'}}^{r} - t_{k , i}^{r} + \left(\bar{d}\right)_{k , i} \leq \alpha_{d , k} , \forall 1 \leq i \leq 2 I , k \in \mathcal{K}\end{matrix}

formulas.latex: \begin{aligned}\left(\overset{\rightarrow}{\theta}\right)_{k , i}^{n + 1} & = & \left(\overset{\rightarrow}{\theta}\right)_{k , i}^{n} - \frac{1}{2} \alpha_{n} \nabla_{\left(\overset{\rightarrow}{\theta}\right)_{k , i}} \left[Q \left(\mathbf{S}_{k , i} , \mathbf{x}_{k , i}\right) - \left(\bar{Q}\right)^{n} \left(\mathbf{S}_{k , i} , \mathbf{x}_{k , i}\right)\right]^{2} \\ & = & \left(\overset{\rightarrow}{\theta}\right)_{k , i}^{n} + \alpha_{n} \left[Q \left(\mathbf{S}_{k , i} , \mathbf{x}_{k , i}\right) - \left(\bar{Q}\right)^{n} \left(\mathbf{S}_{k , i} , \mathbf{x}_{k , i}\right)\right] \nabla_{\left(\overset{\rightarrow}{\theta}\right)_{k , i}} \left(\bar{Q}\right)^{n} \left(\mathbf{S}_{k , i} , \mathbf{x}_{k , i}\right) ,\end{aligned}

formulas.latex: \begin{aligned}N_{k}^{v} \left(\left(\hat{a}\right)_{k , i}\right) & = & N_{k}^{v} \left(\left(\hat{a}\right)_{k , i - 1}\right) + N_{b , k , i - 1} - N_{a , k , i - 1} \\ & = & \hdots \\ & = & N_{k}^{v} \left(\left(\hat{a}\right)_{k , 1}\right) + \underset{1 \leq r < i}{\sum} \left(N_{b , k , r} - N_{a , k , r}\right) .\end{aligned}

formulas.label: eq0057
formulas.latex: \begin{aligned}N_{k}^{v} \left(\left(\hat{a}\right)_{k , i}\right) & = & \underset{1 \leq r < i}{\sum} \left(N_{b , k , r} - N_{a , k , r}\right) \\ & = & \underset{1 \leq r < i}{\sum} \left(N_{b , k , r} - \sum_{\phi = 0}^{r - 1} N_{b , k , \phi , r}\right) \\ & = & \underset{1 \leq r < i}{\sum} \left\{\lambda_{r} \left(\left(\hat{d}\right)_{k , r} - \left(\hat{d}\right)_{k - 1 , r}\right) - \sum_{\phi = 0}^{r - 1} \left[\tau_{\phi , r} \left(\left(\hat{d}\right)_{k , \phi} - \left(\hat{d}\right)_{k - 1 , \phi}\right)\right]\right\} ,\end{aligned}

formulas.label: eq0058
formulas.latex: \begin{aligned}N_{k}^{v} \left(\left(\hat{d}\right)_{k , i}\right) & = & N_{k}^{v} \left(\left(\hat{a}\right)_{k , i}\right) + N_{b , k , i} - N_{a , k , i} \\ & = & \underset{1 \leq r < i + 1}{\sum} \left\{\lambda_{r} \left(\left(\hat{d}\right)_{k , r} - \left(\hat{d}\right)_{k - 1 , r}\right) - \sum_{\phi = 0}^{r - 1} \left[\tau_{\phi , r} \left(\left(\hat{d}\right)_{k , \phi} - \left(\hat{d}\right)_{k - 1 , \phi}\right)\right]\right\} .\end{aligned}

formulas.label: eq0059
formulas.latex: \begin{aligned}T_{t r a v e l} & = & \underset{k \in \mathcal{K}}{\sum} \underset{1 \leq i < 2 I}{\sum} \left\{\left(\left(\hat{d}\right)_{k , i} - \left(\hat{a}\right)_{k , i}\right) \left[N_{k}^{v} \left(\left(\hat{a}\right)_{k , i}\right) - N_{a , k , i}\right] + \left(\left(\hat{a}\right)_{k , i + 1} - \left(\hat{d}\right)_{k , i}\right) N_{k}^{v} \left(\left(\hat{d}\right)_{k , i}\right)\right\} \\ & = & \underset{k \in \mathcal{K}}{\sum} \underset{1 \leq i < 2 I}{\sum} \left\{\left(\left(\hat{d}\right)_{k , i} - \left(\hat{a}\right)_{k , i}\right) \left[N_{k}^{v} \left(\left(\hat{d}\right)_{k , i}\right) - N_{b , k , i}\right] + \left(\left(\hat{a}\right)_{k , i + 1} - \left(\hat{d}\right)_{k , i}\right) N_{k}^{v} \left(\left(\hat{d}\right)_{k , i}\right)\right\} \\ & = & \underset{k \in \mathcal{K}}{\sum} \underset{1 \leq i < 2 I}{\sum} \left[\left(\left(\hat{a}\right)_{k , i + 1} - \left(\hat{a}\right)_{k , i}\right) N_{k}^{v} \left(\left(\hat{d}\right)_{k , i}\right) - N_{b , k , i} \left(\left(\hat{d}\right)_{k , i} - \left(\hat{a}\right)_{k , i}\right)\right] \\ & = & \underset{k \in \mathcal{K}}{\sum} \underset{1 \leq i < 2 I}{\sum} \left\{\right. \left(\left(\hat{a}\right)_{k , i + 1} - \left(\hat{a}\right)_{k , i}\right) \underset{1 \leq r < i + 1}{\sum} \left\{\lambda_{r} \left(\left(\hat{d}\right)_{k , r} - \left(\hat{d}\right)_{k - 1 , r}\right) - \sum_{\phi = 0}^{r - 1} \left[\tau_{\phi , r} \left(\left(\hat{d}\right)_{k , \phi} - \left(\hat{d}\right)_{k - 1 , \phi}\right)\right]\right\} \\ & & - \lambda_{i} \left(\left(\hat{d}\right)_{k , i} - \left(\hat{d}\right)_{k - 1 , i}\right) \left(\left(\hat{d}\right)_{k , i} - \left(\hat{a}\right)_{k , i}\right) \left.\right\} .\end{aligned}
